title: Web Terminal Configuration
description: Configuration for the web-terminal extension. Streams a PTY to the browser over SSE and takes input via POST. A browser terminal is remote code execution by design: set a token unless the listener is otherwise protected.

command.description: Executable to run inside the PTY (e.g. "/bin/bash").

writable.description: Whether client keystrokes are written to the PTY. Set to false for a read-only terminal.

serve_frontend.description: Whether to serve the bundled xterm.js client at "/". Disabled by default; the /stream, /input and /resize endpoints are the primary interface. Set to true to serve the bundled client.
